page_content:
### **Summary of Recent Work (2024–2026)**  
- **Clinical Operations & Pharmacy Support:** Balancing a rigorous graduate curriculum while working 25–30 hours per week as a Pharmacy Technician at Walgreens, where I manage insurance adjudication, inventory optimization, and direct patient support.  
- **High-Acuity Clinical Volunteering:** Logged over 100 hours as an ICU Volunteer at Medical City (Denton and Frisco), gaining firsthand exposure to critical care workflows, supporting nursing staff, and facilitating communication for patient families.  
- **Advanced Machine Learning Optimization:** Engineered a high-performance deep learning pipeline for geometric data analysis at Georgia Tech, achieving a 90% reduction in training/inference time (from 5 hours down to 30 minutes) through algorithmic efficiency.  
- **Predictive Neural Network Modeling:** Developed a multi-layer neural network in PyTorch, utilizing systematic grid search for hyperparameter tuning to improve predictive accuracy from 85% to 95% on a 10,000-record dataset.  
- **Biomedical Engineering Innovation:** Led a senior design team to fabricate a low-cost, silicone-molded aortic valve replacement, reducing unit costs from $10,000 to $500 while validating performance against ISO standards through hemodynamic simulations.  
---
